english translation text: In the name of Allah the Beneficent, the Merciful.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

Allah is the Greatest
Before everyone (glorifies Him).

Allah is the Greatest
After everyone (glorifies Him).

Allah is the Greatest
When everyone (glorifies Him)

arabic text: وَاللهُ اَكْبَرُ يَبْقى رَبُّنا ويَفْنى كُلُّ وأحَد
english translation text:
Allah is the Greatest
Everlasting Forever is our Lord and everyone passes away.

arabic text: وَاللهُ اَكْبَرُ تَكبيراً يَفْضُلُ تكبير الْمكبرينَ فَضْلاً كَثيراً قَبْلَ كُلِّ اَحَد
english translation text:
Allah is the Greatest
The glorification of the glorifiers exalts His glory. Immeasurably exalted is His glory, before everyone (exalts Him).

arabic text: وَاللهُ اَكْبَرُ تَكبيراً يَفْضُلُ تكبير الْمكبرينَ فَضْلاً كَثيراً بَعْدَ كُلِّ اَحَد
english translation text:
Allah is the Greatest
The glorification of the glorifiers exalts His glory, immeasurably exalted is His glory, after everyone (exalts Him).

arabic text: وَاللهُ اَكْبَرُ تَكبيراً يَفْضُلُ تكبير الْمكبرينَ فَضْلاً كَثيراً مَعَ كُلِّ اَحَد
english translation text:
Allah is the Greatest
The glorification of the glorifiers exalts His glory, immeasurably exalted is His glory, when everyone (exalts Him).

arabic text: وَاللهُ اَكْبَرُ تَكبيراً يَفْضُلُ تكبير الْمكبرينَ فَضْلاً كَثيراً لِرَبِّنَا الْباقى وَيَفْنى كُلِّ اَحَد
english translation text:
Allah is the Greatest
The glorification of the glorifiers exalts His glory; immeasurably exalted is the glory of our Everlasting Lord, Nourisher, and everyone passes away.

arabic text: وَاللهُ اَكْبَرُ تَكبيراً لا يُحْصى وَلا يُدْرى وَلا يُنْسى وَلا يَبْلى وَلا يَفْنى وَلَيْسَ لَهُ مُنْتَهى
english translation text:
Allah is the Greatest
Glory which is, Immeasurable, Unperceivable, Unforgettable, Imperishable, Indestructible, and there is no end to it

arabic text: وَاللهُ اَكْبَرُ تَكبيراً يَدوُمُ بِدَوامِهِ وَيَبْقى بِبَقآئِهِ فى سِنِى الْعالَمينَ وَشُهوُرِ الدُّهوُرِ وَاَيّامِ الدُّنْيا وَساعاتِ اللَّيْلِ وَالنَّهارِ
english translation text: Allah is the GreatestEverlasting duration of His glory makes His glorification eternal, continuous existence of His glory keeps His glorification alive for ever, throughout the cosmic ages, months all through the centuries, days passing by in tHis world, and every moment of the nights and days.

arabic text: وَاللهُ اَكْبَرُ اَبَدَ الاَْبَدِ وَمَعَ الاَْبَدِ مِمّا لا يُحْصيهِ الْعَدَدُ وَلا يُفْنيهِ الاَْمَدُ وَلا يَقْطَعُهُ الاَْبَدُ
english translation text:
Allah is the Greatest
Never-ending glorification along with ever eternal glory, which neither can be counted in addition, nor can be terminated into an end, nor can ever be discontinued
be praised and hallowed in Allah, the Best Creator

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
